name: Ninja Art: Pressure Points
outcome: [AttackerName] darts forwards and strikes [TargetName] on various spots on [TargetHisOrHer] body with [AttackerHisOrHer] nimble fingers, [AttackerHisOrHer] assault feeling strangely pleasant as [AttackerHeOrShe] moves away with a grin!
miss: [AttackerName] darts forwards and tries to strike [TargetName]'s body on various spots with [AttackerHisOrHer] nimble fingers, but [TargetName] dodges every strike!
statusOutcome: [TargetName] shudders as [TargetHeOrShe] realizes [TargetHisOrHer] body is more sensitive!
